title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: yggdrasil bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for yggdrasil is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: yggdrasil-0.4.6 changes cause yggdrasil to not connect to configured broker unless protocol is configure explicitly
yggdrasil fails TLS connection with a post-quantum key exchange

full_text:
An update for yggdrasil is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
